name: Chocolate Mousse Flan
recipeInstructions:
You need a 9 1/2-inch flan pan with a removable bottom to make this spectacular dessert. For the pastry: Combine flour, icing sugar, and melted chocolate in a bowl. Cut in softened butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Form into a ball with your hands and press into the bottom and sides of a flan ring pan that has been greased. Chill for 1 hour. Bake at 425°F for 10 minutes; cool.
For the mousse filling: Bring whipping cream to a boil, then add melted chocolate and butter, stirring until melted. Blend in egg yolks until well combined. Remove from heat. Beat egg whites until frothy, gradually adding sugar until stiff peaks form. Gently fold into the chocolate mixture and pour over the pastry crust. Chill for 10 minutes.
Garnish: Shortly before serving, sprinkle grated chocolate (use a vegetable peeler to make curls) over the mousse. Lay strips of wax paper across the flan and sift icing sugar on top. Remove the wax paper. Do not serve this dessert on a hot day; it will melt.
